subject: Warp processing triggers random blue screen and windows reboot
body:
Dear all,

I am experiencing random blue screen and reboot while processing a Falcon3 
.tiff dataset.
After reboot, Warp won't continue to process as it hangs at the "repairing 
metadata" step.

The only way is to remove all warp directories and folders and start from 
scratch but the problem appears again after 100-150 movies.

I have tried to check in the Windows event viewer but was not successful at 
pinpointing the possible problem.

Any help would be appreciated.

Sebastien
